name: The Will Cain Show

name: Morning Joe

name: CNN News Central

description: From TPC San Antonio in San Antonio.

name: The Last Supper
description: An explosive final dinner in Italy fractures friendships as Beverly Hills braces for the fallout.

name: The Herd With Colin Cowherd
description: A thought-provoking, opinionated and topic-driven journey through the top sports stories of the day with host Colin Cowherd.

name: Animal House
description: Bluto (John Belushi), Otter and the rowdy Deltas make fools of the dean and the square Omegas at 1962 Faber College.

name: The Solo Oscillation
description: Sheldon kicks Amy out to work solo; Amy and Leonard bond during a series of science experiments; Bert replaces Wolowitz in the band; Sheldon finds Penny a surprising source of scientific inspiration.
